PowerShell($body = '{"question": "Привет, есть ли кассовый разрыв?", "horizon_days": 30}'; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/ai/ask" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" | Select-Object -ExpandProperty answer | ForEach-Object { $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $_.Length\)\) })

PowerShell($body = '{"question": "test", "horizon_days": 30}'; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/ai/ask" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" } catch { $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\) | ForEach-Object { $reader = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new\($_\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } })

PowerShell($body = '{"question": "test", "horizon_days": 30}'; $result = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/ai/ask" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Status:" $result.StatusCode; Write-Host "Body:" $result.Content)

PowerShell($body = '{"question": "test", "horizon_days": 30}'; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/ai/ask" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $response = $_.Exception.Response; $stream = $response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })

PowerShell($body = '{"question": "Есть ли кассовый разрыв в ближайшие 30 дней?", "horizon_days": 30}'; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/ai/ask" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" | Select-Object -ExpandProperty answer | ForEach-Object { $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $_.Length\)\) })

PowerShell([Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $body = '{"question": "Есть ли кассовый разрыв?", "horizon_days": 30}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/ai/ask" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; $r.answer.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $r.answer.Length\)\))

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\IT\\FlowMind\\frontend"; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/k npm run dev" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object StatusCode, @{N='OK';E={$_.StatusCode -eq 200}})

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "Frontend status:" $r.StatusCode } catch { Write-Host "Not up yet:" $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\IT\\FlowMind\\frontend"; Start-Process -FilePath "powershell.exe" -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "Set-Location 'D:\\IT\\FlowMind\\frontend'; npm run dev" -WindowStyle Normal; Write-Host "Frontend window launched")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "✅ Frontend is UP - Status:" $r.StatusCode } catch { Write-Host "❌ Still not up:" $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\IT\\FlowMind\\backend"; Start-Process -FilePath ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "run.py" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; Write-Host "--- Simulate ---"; $sim = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/cashflow/simulate?horizon_days=30"; Write-Host "Min balance: $\($sim.min_balance\) on $\($sim.min_balance_day\)"; Write-Host "Gaps detected: $\($sim.gaps.Count\)"; foreach \($g in $sim.gaps\) { Write-Host "  $\($g.start\) - $\($g.end\), depth $\($g.max_depth\)" })
